name_en: 🌸 [No packaging for this size] 🌈 Y Brand continues its minimalist new bucket bag, featuring imported lambskin drawstrings and a signature logo. Large capacity design, combining beauty and practicality, very roomy. The lambskin surface is soft and smooth with a premium texture! Comes with a detachable pouch, adjustable shoulder strap, easily switching between a crossbody or shoulder bag! Satisfies various daily occasions, full of three-dimensional feel! Perfectly interprets low-key minimalism 👍
